summary: El Gobierno prevé recibir "en semanas" el visto bueno de Bruselas a un sexto pago de 7.000 millones de los fondos 'NextGen' pero solo tiene hasta el 31 de agosto para desbloquear los 25.000 restantes. Leer

title: Is it worth getting a lawyer for your Spanish citizenship application?
summary: If you're eligible and are thinking about applying for Spanish citizenship, should you get a lawyer to help you or can you do it yourself? And how much would it cost to get legal help?

title: Biggest EU economies agree on steps for financial integration
summary: The finance ministers of the European Union's six biggest economies said Friday they had agreed on steps to better integrate financial markets and make investments flow seamlessly across the bloc.

title: Inside Spain: Is corruption inevitable in the land of the picaresque?
summary: In this week's Inside Spain, we look at why many ordinary Spaniards feel justified to 'cheat the system' in a country where corruption among the political elite is rife.

title: EXPLAINED: The changes to Spain's flexible retirement scheme
summary: Spain has introduced a major overhaul to its flexible retirement system which includes better conditions for current and former self-employed and salaried workers.

title: 'Chorizo': The vocab you need to understand Spain's corruption scandals
summary: What does it mean if a politician is called a 'chorizo'? Who's a 'plumber' in Spanish politics? With corruption on everybody's lips in Spain, it's easy to get lost unless you understand the jargon used everywhere from the news to your local bar.
